title: omphalodaphne citriodora
intro: Omphalodaphne citriodora, also known as the Lemon-leaf tree or Lemon-scented tree, is a plant species native to Sri Lanka, known for its distinctive lemon-scented leaves. The medicinal properties of Omphalodaphne citriodora include its use in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. This plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing stress, promoting digestion, and acting as an antioxidant. The herbal preparations of Omphalodaphne citriodora include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
